original_image_tags: A single pink/salmon-colored index card or form slip. The top edge has two punched holes. There are multiple stamped impressions on the page, some oriented upright and some inverted or at angles, indicating different processing steps.

elements.description: A pink document back with two punched holes at the top. Several faded blue stamped impressions are visible, though some are partially obscured or reversed. One clear upright stamp reads 'RECEIVED TELETYPE UNIT Aug 9 11 26 PM '47 DEPT OF JUSTICE'. A reversed stamp in the lower right reads 'RECEIVED AUG 11 9 31 AM INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I.' A reversed stamp in the lower left reads 'AUG 9 11 23 PM '47 RADIO COMMUNICATIONS' with 'OUT' stamped below it.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual content of a pink document with two punched holes and multiple stamped impressions, but Description B adds specific quoted text from the stamps that Description A does not mention, without contradicting Description A's claims.
